retry_reason: Not a refcount wrapper; function-level failure indicates a timeout or error that may be retryable at a higher level, but retry logic is not inherent to wrap semantics.

judge.reason: The function's primary purpose is to wait on a set of fences until they signal or timeout. The refcount operations (amdgpu_cs_get_fence / dma_fence_put) are merely internal bookkeeping to safely access the fences. No reference-counted object is exposed to the caller; the function only returns a status and error code. Significant non-refcount logic includes timeout conversion, loop iteration, error checking, and status writeback.
